flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Welch College fell 15% between 2021 and 2024 (72.1% → 61.2%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Welch College fell 14% between 2021 and 2024 (62.2% → 53.4%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Welch College fell 13% between 2021 and 2024 (261 → 226).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Welch College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.6% → 0.0%).
